Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.tactics

Class DefaultApplicationInspector

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.tactics.DefaultApplicationInspector
All Implemented Interfaces:
IFormulaInspector<ITacticApplication>
Direct Known Subclasses:
LocalEqRewriteProvider.LocalEqRewriteAppliInspector
public class DefaultApplicationInspector extends Object implements IFormulaInspector<ITacticApplication>
Default implementation of IFormulaInspector to collect ITacticApplication. Clients should just override the method which expression or predicate concerned by their tactic application.
